intro_highlights.text: Probabilistic predictions are at the heart of modern data science.
intro_highlights.why_good: 开场句把任务价值直接抬到领域核心，适合作为高密度背景句。

intro_highlights.text: We initiate the algorithmic study of calibration testing through the lens of property testing.
intro_highlights.why_good: “initiate ... through the lens of ...”是经典方法论定位句式。

intro_highlights.text: To our knowledge, we are the first to formalize the calibration testing problem.
intro_highlights.why_good: 首创性表达清晰、语气克制。

intro_highlights.text: Our first algorithmic contribution is a nearly-linear time algorithm.
intro_highlights.why_good: 贡献句直接给结果级别，避免空泛。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 先讲校准在预测决策中的中心地位。
指出现有度量和黑盒求解器效率问题。
LP到min-cost flow重写，并给复杂度优势。
